zh.Therfield, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾黑費爾德
zh.Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾黑費爾德
zh.Therfield, Hertsfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾黑費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Woode於1551年6月26日出生在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德時，他的父親William Wode36歲，母親Agnes Prist25歲。他於1571年5月17日與Marcy Smythe在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1587年12月2日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾黑費爾德享年36歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Woode于1551年6月26日出生在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德时，他的父亲William Wode36岁，母亲Agnes Prist25岁。他于1571年5月17日与Marcy Smythe在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1587年12月2日在英国英格兰賀特福爾黑費爾德享年36岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Woode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Wood
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Woode was born on 26 June 1551, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, his father, William Wode, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Prist, was 25. He married Marcy Smythe on 17 May 1571, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 December 1587, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Woode est né le 26 juin 1551, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Wode, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Prist, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marcy Smythe le 17 mai 1571, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 décembre 1587, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Woode am 26. Juni 1551 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wode 36 und seine Mutter Agnes Prist 25. Er hat am 17. Mai 1571 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England Marcy Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Dezember 1587 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Woode è nato il il 26 giugno 1551 nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Wode, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Prist, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marcy Smythe il 17 maggio 1571, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 dicembre 1587, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Therfield, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Woodeが1551年6月26日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで生まれた時，父William Wodeは36歳，母Agnes Pristは25歳であった。1571年5月17日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドでMarcy Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1587年12月2日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで36歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Woode(이)가 1551년 6월 26일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wode(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Prist(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1571년 5월 17일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 Marcy Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1587년 12월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에 묻혔다.

pt.26 june 1551–2 December 1587: 26 de junho de 1551–2 de dezembro de 1587
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Woode nasceu em 26 de junho de 1551, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wode, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Prist, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marcy Smythe em 17 de maio de 1571, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1587, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Woode родился 26 июня 1551 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wode было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Prist, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marcy Smythe 17 мая 1571 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 декабря 1587 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.26 june 1551–2 December 1587: 26 de junio de 1551–2 de diciembre de 1587
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Woode nació el 26 de junio de 1551, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wode, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes Prist, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marcy Smythe el 17 de mayo de 1571, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1587, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
